title: Tounatea pilulifera

preparations: Tounatea pilulifera is a plant native to New Zealand and has been used in traditional Maori medicine for various purposes. Herbal preparations from Tounatea pilulifera, known as Kawakawa, have been used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The leaves of the plant are typically used to create teas, infusions, and topical treatments. In modern times, extracts from Tounatea pilulifera are also used in skincare products and as an anti-inflammatory agent.
